recipes.name: Sardines on Toast
recipes.description: Classic sardines on toast with lemon and pepper
recipes.instructions: Toast the bread. Drain sardines and place on toast. Squeeze lemon juice over top. Season with pepper flakes, parsley, salt and pepper.

recipes.name: Sardine Pasta
recipes.description: Spaghetti with sardines, garlic, and chili
recipes.instructions: Cook pasta. In a pan, sauté garlic in olive oil until golden. Add sardines and break them up. Add chili and cooked pasta. Toss everything together with parsley.

recipes.name: Sardine Salad Bowl
recipes.description: Fresh salad with sardines and citrus dressing
ingredients: 1 can sardines in water or olive oil
recipes.instructions: Arrange greens in bowl. Top with sardines, avocado, tomatoes, and onion. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.

recipes.name: Sardine Fried Rice
recipes.description: Quick fried rice with sardines and vegetables
recipes.instructions: Heat oil in wok. Scramble eggs and set aside. Fry rice until crispy. Add sardines, peas, and soy sauce. Mix in eggs and green onions. Finish with sesame oil.

recipes.name: Sardine Crepes
recipes.description: Savory crepes with sardines and herbs
recipes.instructions: Spread cream cheese on crepes. Layer sardines on top. Sprinkle with dill, capers, and lemon zest. Fold and serve.

recipes.name: Sardines & Chickpeas
recipes.description: Sardines with chickpeas and Mediterranean spices
recipes.instructions: Sauté garlic in olive oil. Add chickpeas and spices. Cook until chickpeas are crispy. Top with sardines and cilantro.
